title: VoxLib
description: Gone are the days when you must create a new voxel shape for every direction your block faces! With the help of this library, with can be done with the use a simple function.
body: Gone are the days when you must create a new voxel shape for every direction your block faces! With the help of this library, it can all be done with a simple function. This mod adds some tools that help modders to more easily manipulate, create, and rotate voxel shapes in their code! ## Required Dependencies - Fabric - Fabric Language Kotlin - Adds compatibility for the programming language this mod is written in ## Additional Links - Curse Forge
